name: Marp Slides Presenter

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
Patch release addressing the markdown-it vulnerability warning from the community plugin review.

- Force markdown-it >= 14.1.1 across the dependency tree via pnpm.overrides (transitive dep through @marp-team/marpit). Now resolves to 14.2.0.
- No source code changes; Marp rendering verified unchanged.

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
Addresses Obsidian community plugin review feedback for v1.3.0.

## Breaking change
**Marp CLI is no longer bundled.** To use HTML / PDF / PNG / image-based PPTX export, install it separately:

```bash
npm install -g @marp-team/marp-cli
```

Then set **Settings → Marp Slides Presenter → Marp CLI Path** (defaults to `marp`, resolved via `PATH`).

The **Editable PPTX** export keeps working out of the box (uses PptxGenJS in-process).

## Why
The bundled `@marp-team/marp-cli` pulled in the TypeScript compiler and Puppeteer, which caused the reviewer to flag the plugin for:
- Code obfuscation (TypeScript's diagnostic strings contain `_0x...` hex constants)
- 9 dynamic `<script>` element creations (Puppeteer)
- Reading system identity info (Puppeteer's `os.hostname` / `os.userInfo`)
- Bundle size of 20 MB

After externalizing marp-cli, the bundle is 6.5 MB and the above flags are gone.

## Other review fixes
- Replace `fs-extra` with native `fs`
- Replace `builtin-modules` with `node:module`'s `builtinModules`
- Drop `vault/` test fixtures from the repo (their theme CSS triggered external-URL CSS lint errors)
- Remove `!important` from own slide-container rules
- Migrate from npm to pnpm with strict dependency resolution and a packageManager pin

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
Initial release prepared for submission to the Obsidian Community Plugins directory.

## Changes since v1.2.1
- Set `isDesktopOnly: true` — the plugin relies on Node.js APIs (filesystem, Marp CLI, child processes) and is not compatible with Obsidian Mobile.
- Bumped `minAppVersion` to `1.5.0` (popout window API).
- README rewritten with English-first content and explicit disclosures for network use (`https://kroki.io` for Kroki diagrams) and external binary use (`CHROME_PATH`).
- Cleaned up inline styles and a stray `console.log`.

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
## Changes

- プレゼンテーション開始時のモード選択モーダルを廃止し、即座にフルスクリーン＋プレゼンタービューで開始するように変更
- リボンアイコン（Start Presentation）を削除（アクティブなMarkdownViewがない場合に動作しないため）
- プレゼンテーションの開始はコマンドパレットまたはプレビューツールバーから利用可能
releases.name: v1.2.1

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
## What's New

### Presenter View Improvements
- **Popout window fix** — 「別ウィンドウ」モードでスライドが正しく表示されるようになりました
- **Iframe-based slide previews** — 発表者ビューのスライドプレビューがMarpスタイルを正しく維持するようになりました
- **Laser pointer sync** — レーザーポインタの位置が発表者ビューの現在スライドプレビューに赤いドットとして同期表示されます

### Documentation
- プレゼンテーション操作のキーボードショートカット一覧を追加
- 発表者ビューの機能説明を追加
- スピーカーノートの使い方を追加

### Full Changelog
- Fix: popout window blank page by passing `targetDocument` to presentation overlay
- Fix: presenter notes slide previews now use iframes for proper Marp CSS scoping
- Feat: laser pointer position broadcast from presentation to presenter view via `PresentationController`
- Docs: update README with presenter view, keyboard shortcuts, and speaker notes
releases.name: v1.2.0

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

* fix: resolve presentation black screen by using preview rendering approach
  - Replaced DOM parsing + cloneNode with innerHTML injection + CSS display toggle
  - Presentation now uses the same rendering pipeline as Slide Preview
  - Applied marp-core/browser for custom element styles in presentation mode
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: CocoaAI-IT
releases.description:
## Marp Slides Presenter v1.0.0

obsidian-marp-slides (by Samuele Cozzi, MIT License) をフォークした初回リリース。

### 新機能
- フルスクリーンプレゼンテーション (Start Presentation)
- レーザーポインタ (L キー)
- プレビュートグル動作

### セキュリティ修正
- request → Obsidian requestUrl
- パストラバーサル検証

### バグ修正
- 旧 marp-slides との衝突解消
- プレビュー描画の修正
releases.name: v1.0.0
